specific_mechanism: HOPF-Watcher: detect impending Hopf bifurcation in RLHF training by tracking sign of Re(λ_±) of approximate low-rank training Jacobian via Lanczos + Hutchinson.
llm_application: HOPF-Watcher: every 50 RLHF steps, build a low-rank (r=16) Lanczos approximation of the training Jacobian J_t using Hutchinson stochastic trace. Compute its leading complex-conjugate eigenvalue pair λ_± = α ± iω. Track α over training; if α crosses near zero from negative to positive AND ω>0, log Hopf-warning. Three consecutive warnings → early-stop and revert.
novelty_claim: Jacobian-eigenvalue early-warning for bifurcations exists (PMC8300673); RL-controlled Hopf optimization (biorxiv). HOPF-Watcher specifically as RLHF early-stop signal is less common.
motivation_justification: Hopf condition is a precise algebraic condition on Jacobian eigenvalues. Full Jacobian intractable; low-rank approximation imposes some loss of fidelity.
content_words: hopf bifurcation jacobian complex eigenvalue crossing
imaginary axis crossing limit cycle warning signal
early stop revert checkpoint policy oscillation
